item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:duty","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering narrows duty to paid work, substitutes known social disapproval for binding obligation, and wrongly entails repeated performance; add work-or-position grounding and remove the actual-performance entailment."}
